behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS applies: this failure usually appears at module handoff (diff extraction -> prompt/input builder), not inside a single pure function. REAL-INFRA is not required by the behavior text (no explicit real API/OS contract check). LLM-DEP is disqualified because this behavior is about input scoping, not model judgment. Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow due lack of explicit real external contract or model-quality dependency in the behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real diff parser plus input-construction pipeline on fixture PR diffs containing both changed and unchanged code; assert the review payload includes only changed hunks and excludes untouched file bodies.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: SYSTEM TRIAD trigger is explicit: correctness is an externally visible contract in GitHub diff positioning, and must be proven via round-trip observation. In-process mocks can hide real API position-mapping constraints (commit SHA, side, line/position semantics). Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model-output-quality requirement is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments to intended diff locations, then read back posted review comments via GitHub API/UI data and assert path/line/side/position match expected diff anchors.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP is explicit: pass/fail depends on real model judgment (detecting a genuine defect), which stubs cannot validate. Rejected Workflow because behavior asks for a single model-quality outcome (identify at least one real defect), not multiple agentic decisions across steps. Rejected System as primary level because the critical risk is model correctness, not external API contract shape.
behaviors.test_description: Run analysis with the real model on a seeded buggy PR diff and assert at least one returned finding correctly targets the introduced defect (location/category or equivalent evidence).

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS applies at local orchestration/state handoff (inline post responses -> summary assembler). The behavior text does not require validating external response contract beyond internal correspondence logic. Rejected System because no explicit real external contract/round-trip requirement is stated. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because this is ID consistency logic, not model-quality-dependent.
behaviors.test_description: Execute posting-response collection and summary-building modules together using realistic post-response objects; assert every summary finding references an inline comment ID present in that run’s collected responses.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module transformation integrity (findings set -> summary payload), so Integration avoids unit-only false confidence. Behavior text does not require real OS/network/subprocess or model-quality evaluation. Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow due missing explicit external-contract or LLM-decision dependence.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real aggregation/filter/serialization pipeline with multiple inline findings and assert final summary payload preserves complete membership (no missing IDs/items) before submit.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real pull request and end-to-end external side effects (post inline + post summary), satisfying SYSTEM TRIAD (real external happy path and round-trip visibility). LLM-DEP is disqualified by 'fixed precomputed finding set'. Rejected Workflow because no multiple agentic steps are involved.
behaviors.test_description: Run the sequence on a real test PR with fixed findings: fetch diff, post inline comments, post top-level summary; assert API success and verify posted artifacts are visible/readable back on the PR.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a full agent pipeline with model-generated outputs feeding downstream actions and cross-step consistency requirements, so MULTI-STEP applies. It includes both real model dependence and real external side effects; Workflow is the lowest level that covers sequential agentic orchestration risk end-to-end. Rejected Agentic because behavior is not only single-output quality; it requires successful chained execution across analysis and posting steps.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a live unattended run on a real test PR: read diff, generate findings with real model, post inline comments, post summary; assert completion without human edits, successful external postings, and consistency between posted inline comments and summary references.
